content: The eval script should automatically migrate flat JSONL files from .pi/inbox/ root into .pi/inbox/pending/ before scanning. Pi drops files in the flat inbox root; eval picks them up and moves them to pending/. No manual copying needed.

provenance.raw_agent: eval should do it automatically. Move any flat JSONL files from .pi/inbox/ into pending/ before scanning. Now bun run eval handles it automatically.
provenance.raw_user: [sandbox output showing idle due to empty pending/]
